title: Decoding allosteric landscapes: computational methodologies for enzyme modulation and drug discovery
research_objectives: Review computational methodologies for allosteric site identification and characterization
Synthesize recent advancements in allosteric mechanism understanding
Emphasize computational techniques for systematic allosteric modulator discovery
Discuss machine learning applications in allosteric drug discovery
Highlight tools like PASSer, AlloReverse, and AlphaFold for allosteric analysis
Address challenges in allosteric complexity and systematic discovery approaches

research_scope.focus_area: Allosteric regulation mechanisms and computational drug discovery

allosteric_regulation_principles.definition: Ligand binding at distal sites modulates active site activity
allosteric_regulation_principles.biological_significance: Fundamental regulatory mechanism in enzymes and proteins

allosteric_modulator_advantages: Reduced off-target effects and side effects
drug_discovery_context.challenge_addressed: Inherent complexity of allosteric mechanisms hampers discovery

evolutionary_conservation.application: Prioritize allosteric sites for experimental study

specialized_tools.PASSer: Prediction of allosteric sites in sequences
specialized_tools.AlloReverse: Analysis and characterization of allosteric mechanisms

computational_tools_and_resources.integration_approach: Combined use of multiple tools for comprehensive analysis

systematic_discovery_framework.step2: Characterize allosteric mechanisms using MD and analysis
systematic_discovery_framework.step3: Predict allosteric modulator candidates using ML

biotechnology_applications.drug_discovery: Systematic identification of novel allosteric modulators
biotechnology_applications.synthetic_biology: Engineering allosteric control in synthetic systems
